header.title: CSV to JSON — Convert CSV to JSON & JSON to CSV Online
header.description: Free online CSV to JSON converter to transform CSV data into JSON format and vice versa. Supports custom delimiters, headers, nested object parsing, and encoding options. Ideal for data migration and API integration.
header.keywords: csv to json, convert csv to json, csv to json converter, json to csv, csv parser, csv to json online, json converter, data format converter

howToUse.title: How to Use the CSV to JSON Converter
howToUse.step1Desc: Choose CSV → JSON to convert CSV data to JSON, or JSON → CSV for the reverse.
howToUse.step2Desc: Pick the delimiter your CSV uses — comma, semicolon, tab, or let the tool auto-detect it.
howToUse.step3Desc: Toggle options like first-row-as-header, trim whitespace, skip empty lines, and type detection.
howToUse.step4Desc: Select from Array of Objects, Array of Arrays, or Grouped output, then copy or download.

items.question: Can I convert JSON back to CSV?
items.answer: Yes. Switch the direction to JSON → CSV and paste a JSON array to convert it back to CSV format.

items.question: What delimiters are supported?
items.answer: Comma, semicolon, tab, pipe, and space. You can also enable auto-detect to let the tool figure it out.

items.question: Will the tool auto-detect data types?
items.answer: Yes. When enabled, the tool will parse numbers and booleans from string values automatically.

items.question: Can I preview the data as a table?
items.answer: Yes. Switch to Table view to see your parsed data in a tabular layout before copying.

items.question: What happens if my CSV has no header row?
items.answer: Disable the First row is header option and the tool will auto-generate keys like field1, field2, etc.
